name: custom-longctx-lrfam-v5
description: v5: v4's all-4096 target-efficiency PLUS a family reweight toward long-range-structure priors (integrated random-walk, regime-shift, persistent AR2, GP, multi-seasonal) and away from choppy short-range ones (chaotic/intermittent/pulse) that waste the 128-patch context. De-trended (from v3). Numpy-only, deterministic.
